page_content:
Prerequisite: LARC220, LARC265, LARC266, and LARC230.

Corequisite: LARC411 and LARC221.

Restriction: Must be in Landscape Architecture program; and sophomore standing or higher.

Credit Only Granted for. LARC340 or LARC231.

Formerly: LARC340.

Graphic Communication and Design Studio (4 Credits) Exploration of graphic presentation techniques and original concept development for landscape architecture planning and design. Prerequisite: LARC141 and LARC263.
